properties.name: dismiss-button-aria-label
properties.description: Sets a custom aria-label to the close button

properties.name: full-width-body
properties.description: Sets the element's body to full width (no padding)

properties.name: icon
properties.description: A decorative icon the custom element should have. See the [Vivid Icon Gallery](/icons/icons-gallery/) for available icons and `icon-name`'s

properties.name: modal
properties.description: Sets the element's to be opened

properties.name: no-dismiss-on-esc
properties.description: prevent a modal dialog from being dismissed by pressing esc

properties.name: no-light-dismiss
properties.description: prevent a modal dialog from being dismissed by clicking outside of it.

properties.name: open
properties.description: Sets the element's to be opened

properties.name: returnValue
properties.description: Sets the element's to be opened

properties.name: scrollable-body
properties.description: Makes only the element's content area between the header and footer scrollable

slots.name: action-items
slots.description: Use for adding action items to the bottom of the dialog

slots.name: body
slots.description: Add custom content to the dialog's body

slots.name: footer
slots.description: Add additional content to the bottom of the dialog.

slots.name: graphic
slots.description: Add graphic element to dialog. Overrides the icon property
